emails.subject: RE: Haldor Topsoe
emails.body: Dan, Haldor Topsoe has requested a maximum volume of 1600 mmbtu per day and the new deal will replace the old deal at a new price of 110% IF-HSC for total requirements with an end date of 8/31/2004. FYI we are putting about $120,000 of facilities in to this location and it will have a new meter roughly 800 feet from the old one. I am not sure at this time if we will read both meters or just one. Dan J Hyvl 04/25/2001 10:29 AM

emails.subject: RE: Haldor Topsoe

emails.subject: RE: Haldor Topsoe
emails.body: RE: Haldor Topsoe Gary, The final version is attached for you to send to the customer and have them sign and return 2 originals to HPL. We can then sign and give them one original.
